### Product Enhancement :

#### Schema Management Enhancements –

Introduced enhancements to schema management in Dataset Settings, enabling easier column updates, naming standardization, and AI-assisted schema improvements directly within the interface.


### Defect Fixes :
Resolved the following issues:

* SFTP exports automatically generated a filename and created a new file on every run without allowing users to specify the file name.
* In BigQuery datasets, editing the query from the Preview Panel showed a continuous loader.
* BigQuery export showed a continuous loader when the dataset contained special characters in column names or content.
* BigQuery export to external destinations did not display a clear error when special characters in column names caused failures during subsequent runs.
* PostgreSQL export to external destinations showed a continuous loader in the pipeline when incorrect credentials were provided.
